payload.subject: Batch A detailed review received — per-post AR scoring and defensibility findings acknowledged
payload.reception_summary: Received detailed adversarial-register + defensibility + source-verification review for 8 voter guide posts. AR scores range 5.8-7.5 (mean 6.6, median 6.5). 28 defensibility findings across the batch: 7 MEDIUM severity, 21 LOW. All posts pass or pass-with-notes.
top_actions: F-4/F-5: Add AI displacement citations + hedging language
F-22: Update Optional Protocol ratification count
F-3/F-10/F-11/F-13/F-16: Add 5-8 citations across voter guide posts
payload.remediation_status: Accumulating findings until all batches complete. Same detailed per-post format welcome for subsequent batches.
payload.re_score_request: Standing: re-score under AR + EM rubrics after remediation.
